issues.title: Inference 28 Feb 2026

issues.summary: Leading with Trump moves to ban Anthropic from the US government, and the rest of the week's best AI signal.
issues.search_text: This week at a glance This week If You Only Read One Thing Fast Signals Learn This Week Prompt of the Week One to test this week ⭐ Open-source picks 🔬 Research worth your time ☁️ Infra 🌐 What changed in industry Trump moves to ban Anthropic from the US government Show HN: IssueScout – Find open source issues worth contributing to A Complete End-to-End Coding Guide to MLflow Experiment Tracking, Hyperparameter Optimization, Model Evaluation, and Live Model Deployment Alibaba Team Open-Sources CoPaw: A High-Performance Personal Agent Workstation for Developers to Scale Multi-Channel AI Workflows and Memory OpenClaw, but in containers: Meet NanoClaw SaaS-pocalypse chatter is doomster pr0n.
